activities_projects.title: Identify Major Rivers of India
steps: Open the map of India in your atlas
Locate major rivers such as Ganga, Brahmaputra and Indus
Write their names and the states they flow through
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students identify major rivers and their locations

activities_projects.title: Drainage Basin Concept
activities_projects.objective: Understand the meaning of a drainage basin
steps: Read the section explaining drainage basin
Write the definition in your notebook
Give one example of a river basin in India
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the concept of drainage basin

activities_projects.title: Water Divide Illustration
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of water divide
steps: Draw two rivers flowing in different directions
Mark the high land separating them
Label it as water divide
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how water divides separate river basins
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of drawing and labeling (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: List Himalayan Rivers
steps: Read the section on Himalayan rivers
List major rivers such as Indus, Ganga and Brahmaputra
Write one important tributary for each river
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students identify important Himalayan rivers and tributaries
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct listing of rivers and tributaries (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Peninsular Rivers Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand the rivers of Peninsular India
steps: Write the heading 'Peninsular Rivers'
List rivers such as Godavari, Krishna, Kaveri and Mahanadi
Mention the direction they flow
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about important Peninsular rivers

activities_projects.title: River and Tributary Matching
activities_projects.objective: Learn relationships between rivers and tributaries
steps: Write names of major rivers in one column
Write tributaries in another column
Match each river with its tributaries
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand river systems and tributaries

activities_projects.title: Locate Lakes of India
steps: Locate lakes such as Wular, Chilika and Sambhar in the atlas
Write the state in which each lake is located
Mention whether it is freshwater or saltwater
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students identify major lakes and their characteristics

activities_projects.title: Importance of Lakes
steps: Read the section on lakes
List at least five uses of lakes
Explain any two uses briefly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of lakes in human life
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and correctness of points (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Rivers in Daily Life
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of rivers in the economy
steps: Think about how rivers help people
Write uses such as irrigation, transport and electricity generation
Give examples from India
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect rivers with economic activities

activities_projects.title: River Pollution Awareness
steps: Write the title 'Save Our Rivers'
Draw a river and show clean vs polluted water
Add messages to reduce pollution
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the causes and effects of river pollution
